title: malpighia woodburyana
intro: Malpighia woodburyana, also known as the Jamaican cherry or Strawberry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its high content of ascorbic acid, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malpighia woodburyana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Malpighia woodburyana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Caribbean and Central America.
